{{Infobox group
| name = Corporate Subline
| introduced = lh-01-the-captain
}}

== The Captain ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Corporate Subline]] issues reports.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c25">''The Captain'', chapter 25</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Corporate Subline]] is a way to contact organizations like the [[Vallenar Corporation]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c36">''The Captain'', chapter 36</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Corporate Subline]] is a destination or route mentioned by the [[Captain]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c38">''The Captain'', chapter 38</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|“Are we close enough to reach the Corporate Subline?” I asked.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c38" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon groups]]
